prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约10385→11205→11459→11375→11873，近5年整体呈后移趋势，累计后移约1488名；2025年基准约11873名，近2年波动约500名；本省物理类计划2021年69人、2022年70人、2023年76人、2024年74人、2025年80人，呈稳步扩招趋势；2026年计划87人，较2025年增加7人（+8.75%），扩招 幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2021年第56名→2026年第51名，排名稳步上升，体现学校综合实力持续增强，对考生吸引力有 所提升；2023年声誉评价偏负面（小语种专业位次下降6211名），但属局部专业现象；抖音热度总排名第21（较热），综合热度约243万，短视频曝光量处于中 上水平，反映报考关注度尚可；未见明显投档断档记录；水产A+、海洋科学A+、生物学A-、食品科学与工程A-，海洋与水产学科全国顶尖，对相关方向考生有较 强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类为高热推荐专业，与该校计算机类、电子信息类招生专业高度契合，带动相关专业组竞争；本省物理类考生2021 年20.6万→2025年32.0万→2026年34.7万，持续增长（2026年较2025年+8.4%），竞争基数扩大，呈下降趋势，但位次竞争仍加剧；学校位于山东青岛，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；湖南省考生对沿海985高校认可度较高，跨省报考热度稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年扩招8.75%与考生增加8.4%基本对冲、学校排名提升至51位增强吸引力、计算机/电子信息类专业热度高带动竞争，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年11873名基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约12623名，区间12123–13123名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 10385 → 11205 → 11459 → 11375 → 11873, showing a general backward trend over the past 5 years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1488 places; the 2025 baseline is about 11873, with a fluctuation of about 500 places in the past 2 years; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 69 in 2021, 70 in 2022, 76 in 2023, 74 in 2024, and 80 in 2025, showing a steady expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 87, an increase of 7 (+8.75%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, it went from 56th in 2021 to 51st in 2026, steadily rising, reflecting the continuous enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength, which increases its appeal to candidates; in 2023, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (the ranking of minor language majors dropped by 6211 places), but this is a localized phenomenon; on Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 21st (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 2.43 million, and short video exposure is at an upper-middle level, reflecting a moderate level of application interest; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Aquatic Products A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-, with marine and aquatic disciplines at the national top level, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication are highly recommended popular majors, highly consistent with the university's Computer Science and Electronic Information enrollment categories, driving competition in related major groups; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province was 206,000 in 2021 → 320,000 in 2025 → 347,000 in 2026, continuously increasing (2026 vs 2025 +8.4%), expanding the competition base, showing a downward trend, but ranking competition still intensifies; the university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local university, so there is no local enrollment preference; Hunan candidates have a high recognition of coastal 985 universities, with stable cross-provincial application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 8.75% expansion in 2026 and the 8.4% increase in candidates roughly offsetting each other, the university's ranking rising to 51st enhancing its appeal, and the high popularity of Computer/Electronic Information majors driving competition, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 11873; the predicted minimum ranking is about 12623, with a range of 12123–13123.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 12123–13123, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 12000), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors like Computer Science and Marine Science; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 13000), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options and carefully choose Tier 1 majors.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年第51名，近年排名稳中有升，综合实力受认可；2023年声誉偏负面（小语种专业位次下降 6211名），但属局部专业现象；抖音热度总排名第21（较热），综合热度约243万，关注度中上；未见明显投档断档记录；水产A+、海洋科学A+、生物学A-、食 品科学与工程A-，海洋特色鲜明，对相关方向考生有吸引力。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历史类位次波动较大、2026年大幅扩招57%但考生暴增31.2%、文科专业 热度分化（法学偏热、新闻传播劝退），预计2026年历史类最低位次在2025年2178名基础上明显后移；预测最低位次约3000名，区间2500–3500名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1768 → 1408 → 2124 → 1868 → 2178, with significant fluctuations and no clear unilateral trend; the 2025 baseline is about 2178, with a fluctuation range of about 700 in the past 3 years; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 20 in 2021, 20 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 14 in 2025, maintaining a low level from 2024 to 2025; the 2026 plan is 22, an increase of 8 (+57.14%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that notably alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 51st in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable or rising rankings in recent years, and comprehensive strength recognized; the 2023 reputation was slightly negative (minor language majors saw a ranking drop of 6211), but this is a local phenomenon; total Douyin popularity ranking 21st (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 2.43 million, indicating medium-high attention; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; Aquaculture A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-, with distinctive marine characteristics, attractive to candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially hot and recommended, while Journalism and Communication is clearly advised against; the number of provincial History Category candidates was 166,000 in 2021 → 143,000 in 2025 → 187,000 in 2026, a surge of 31.2% from 2025 to 2026, significantly expanding the competition base, with a slight decrease; the university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a provincial university; Hunan candidates have a high recognition of coastal 985 universities, with stable cross-provincial application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the large fluctuations in History Category rankings, a 57% expansion in 2026 but a 31.2% surge in candidates, and the divergence in liberal arts major popularity (Law is hot, Journalism and Communication is discouraged), it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will significantly drop from the 2025 baseline of 2178; the predicted minimum ranking is about 3000, with a range of 2500–3500.
